Icons

Icons should feel warm and organic, never cold or technical. They complement our natural, human-centered design language.

Icon Style

Our icons use rounded corners, consistent stroke widths, and organic shapes that echo the Ferni brand.

Ferni Style

  • 2px stroke width
  • Rounded caps and joins
  • Organic curves

Avoid

  • Sharp corners
  • Thin strokes
  • Harsh geometric shapes

Persona Icons

Each persona has a distinctive icon that reflects their character.

🌿 Ferni Growth, nurturing
🎯 Maya Focus, habits
📊 Peter Analysis, wealth
🎉 Jordan Celebration, planning
📅 Alex Time, productivity
🧘 Nayan Wisdom, reflection

UI Icons

Common icons used throughout the Ferni interface.
